summary: Phase 7.A.1 (drift-detection sweep before Phase 7.A.2's NPC + shop + boss-FSM implementation) complete. The sweep landed exactly the items pinned in docs/PHASES.md Phase 7 callout block: (1) Phase 6.A.2 code-review nit N4 closed — the 3 Phase 3 items that lacked atlas recipes (item.stim-patch, item.trauma-pack, item.cyberdeck-mod-1) gain dedicated recipes; the renderer's latent-throw risk on floor-spawning those items is removed before Phase 7.A.2's shops may stock them. New recipes use the existing palette + primitives (stim-patch: magenta patch with cyan stripe; trauma-pack: red kit with white cross; cyberdeck-mod-1: purple circuit board with green/cyan traces). (2) Atlas regenerated: assets/atlas.png is now 1457 bytes (was 1368; +89 bytes for 3 new sprites) with new ATLAS_DIGEST = a3f7e3caa857b5edbd1728a874b858484e58150658277a54dc9506f0489edb08; assets/atlas.json has 26 sprites (was 23). The existing 23 sprite coordinates from Phase 4 + 6.A.2 are byte-identical (Phase 4 seven at (0..6,0); Phase 6.A.2 sixteen at (7..15,0) and (0..6,1)); the 3 new sprites land at (7,1), (8,1), (9,1) per the addendum 3a row-major placement function. (3) Four preset-seed expectedHash values bumped: placeholder = a3f7e3ca…, variant-A = 5fea9dee…, variant-B = 61f8b72f…, variant-C = 51ac6293…. (4) Goldens propagated: src/core/self-test.ts ATLAS_DIGEST + src/atlas/preset-seeds.ts 4 hashes + tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts ATLAS_DIGEST + 4 hashes + tests/atlas/registry.test.ts count from 23 to 26 — all consistent. (5) docs/ARCHITECTURE.md gains a new 'Phase 7 frozen contracts (NPCs + shops + boss)' section between 'Phase 6 frozen contracts' and 'Build-time constants' (~110 lines) covering: NPC data shape (FloorState gains npcs sorted by kind ASC + (y, x); FloorNpc has kind/pos/inventory; no hp/atk/def — distinct from Monsters); 2-4 additive action types (talk/buy/sell, reuse TAG_TARGET=0x10 + TAG_ITEM=0x20 wire tags, no ACTION_VERSION bump per Phase 1 frozen contract); deterministic shop-transaction resolution with 2 new domain anchors (shop:stock at floor-spawn time, shop:price at action time) — no Math.random; boss FSM as Monster.aiState extension with HP-threshold transitions (deterministic; no random transitions; phase count pinned in 7.A.2); boss-room spawn override at floor 10 via spawnFloorEntities (no mapgen changes); win-state transition wires src/ui/win-screen.ts to render on outcome === 'won'; atlas extension coordinate-stable for Phases 4+6.A.2 (existing 26 sprites pinned, ~4 new in 7.A.2); current ATLAS_DIGEST a3f7e3ca…; deferred contracts (exact action vocab, FSM phase count, win-screen layout, NPC dialog flavor). Phase 6.A.2 nits N1/N2/N3/N5 not addressed because Phase 7.A.1 doesn't touch the corresponding files (src/sim/inventory.ts, tests/sim/inventory*.test.ts, src/sim/turn.ts) — deferred to 7.A.2 if those files are touched. Code-reviewer verdict APPROVE with 0 blockers (artifacts/code-review-phase-7-A-1.md); 2 cosmetic nits addressed in the same approval pass: (a) e2e spec comment incorrectly stated new sprite coordinates as (16,1)/(0,2)/(1,2) — corrected to (7,1)/(8,1)/(9,1); (b) registry append-order documented as registry-declaration-order (not alphabetical-by-recipe-id) per memo decision 3a frozen-at-landing rule. All gates green: 921 tests passing across 64 test files (no net-new tests; refactor + content-only sweep; 3 new recipes have implicit coverage via the whole-atlas ATLAS_DIGEST + 4 preset-seed expectedHash + cross-runtime self-test + Phase 6.B Playwright suite — consistent with Phase 6.A.2's 16-recipe pattern); 0 lint errors; 0 typecheck errors; build 88.71 KB raw / 30.47 KB gzipped (was 87.10 / 30.20; +1.61 KB raw / +0.27 KB gzipped from 3 new recipe modules; ~59% headroom under the 75 KB Phase 2.0 budget). No net-new NPC / shop / boss-FSM code per Phase 7.A.1 acceptance criterion.
suggested_commit_message: phase-7.A.1: drift sweep (3 carry-forward atlas recipes + ATLAS_DIGEST/preset bumps + Phase 7 ARCHITECTURE.md frozen contracts)

verification_sprint.purpose: Confirm Phase 6.B foundation (HEAD of phase-6.B commit 5f7823e) had not drifted before Phase 7.A.1 implementation began, and confirm the 7.A.1 changes maintain the foundation's invariants (existing 23 sprite coordinates byte-identical, SIM_DIGEST + INVENTORY_DIGEST preserved, diagnostic-surface preserved).
verification_sprint.unit_tests: Pre-phase: 921 passed across 64 test files at HEAD of phase-6.B. Post-phase: 921 passed across 64 test files. Net-new: +0 tests — the 3 new recipes have implicit coverage via the whole-atlas ATLAS_DIGEST (cross-runtime self-test) + 4 preset-seed expectedHash assertions + Phase 6.B Playwright suite (60 cross-runtime assertions). The 'ships N entries' test count assertion in tests/atlas/registry.test.ts was bumped from 23 to 26 to match the new registry size.
verification_sprint.lint: eslint . — 0 errors. The 3 new recipe modules + the registry update + the AtlasSlotId union extension all comply with the existing src/atlas/** lint scope (no float arithmetic, no Math.random, no Date, no Buffer / node:buffer / crypto; encoder-pipeline-clean).
verification_sprint.typecheck: tsc -b --noEmit — 0 errors. The 3 new AtlasSlotId union members typecheck against the `slot` field declarations in the new ATLAS_RECIPES entries.
verification_sprint.build: vite build — green; dist/assets/index-*.js = 88.71 KB raw / 30.47 KB gzipped. The +1.61 KB raw / +0.27 KB gzipped delta from phase-6.B's 87.10 KB / 30.20 KB accounts for 3 new recipe modules (50-60 lines each, ~500 bytes minified each); proportional to Phase 6.A.2's 16-recipe gzipped delta. Well under the 75 KB Phase 2.0 budget; ~59% headroom (was 60% at HEAD of phase-6.B).
verification_sprint.primary_workflow: No user-visible runtime changes in 7.A.1 beyond the atlas regeneration. Cross-OS atlas-equality matrix from Phase 4.B will re-assert byte-equality on the new 1457-byte atlas binary in Phase 7.B's CI run. The diagnostic + playable + inventory surfaces continue to render exactly as approved at HEAD of phase-6.B; the cross-runtime Playwright suite (60 assertions) is unchanged structurally — only the pinned ATLAS_DIGEST + 4 preset-seed expectedHash values bumped to match the new atlas. Phase 7.B will re-verify on the live deployment.

three_missing_recipes_added.evidence: src/atlas/recipes/item-stim-patch.ts (54 lines, magenta adhesive patch with cyan stripe + ice-white sparkle), src/atlas/recipes/item-trauma-pack.ts (55 lines, red medical kit with white cross + amber handle + dark trim), src/atlas/recipes/item-cyberdeck-mod-1.ts (53 lines, purple circuit board with green/cyan trace lines + dark connector pins). Each recipe follows the existing pattern (signature `(prng, palette, ctx) => Uint8Array` of length 256; uses paletteIndex + rectMask + valueNoise2D primitives; consumes one prng() call per cell in its noise region for testable cursor advancement). All 3 are correctly registered in src/registries/atlas-recipes.ts with their slot ids matching the canonical ItemKindIds (item.stim-patch, item.trauma-pack, item.cyberdeck-mod-1) — the renderer can now look them up directly via floorItem.kind without throwing.

atlas_regenerated_with_coordinate_stabil.evidence: assets/atlas.png regenerated to 1457 bytes (was 1368 + ~89 bytes for 3 new sprites) with sha256 = a3f7e3caa857b5edbd1728a874b858484e58150658277a54dc9506f0489edb08. assets/atlas.json regenerated with 26 sprites total. Code-reviewer verified byte-identical existing 23 sprite coordinates: Phase 4 seven at (0..6,0); Phase 6.A.2 sixteen at (7..15,0) and (0..6,1); 3 new Phase 7.A.1 sprites land at (7,1), (8,1), (9,1) per the addendum 3a row-major placement function (the 16-wide grid was full at (0..6,1) after Phase 6.A.2; the new entries fill the next three slots in the same row 1).

atlas_digest_and_preset_hashes_bumped.evidence: src/core/self-test.ts:91-92 ATLAS_DIGEST bumped from 35069834850591c6b72c1946629129a04ed2f1b9446de5ccdd75b28fe6005a47 to a3f7e3caa857b5edbd1728a874b858484e58150658277a54dc9506f0489edb08. src/atlas/preset-seeds.ts:28-46 4 expectedHash values bumped (placeholder = a3f7e3ca… (= ATLAS_DIGEST since placeholder uses ATLAS_SEED_DEFAULT); variant-A = 5fea9dee7b220a5689eefaeecff0d44b302e1f2fa5554d499fce57a9e979dcd8; variant-B = 61f8b72f24c98bb1e65b340e5c5b5dd7a3f0cd6f7801644a15fa701d1c5d2056; variant-C = 51ac6293c0953047c3eb27aece3275cd6c17537fa68a74f75d480821c772893f). tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts:14,24,30,36,42 mirrors all 5 values. tests/atlas/registry.test.ts:21-23 count assertion bumped from 23 to 26.

no_net_new_npc_shop_boss_code.evidence: git status --short shows zero new files under src/sim/ (no npcs.ts, no shop.ts, no boss-fsm.ts), zero modifications to src/sim/turn.ts (no new tick handlers for talk/buy/sell), zero modifications to src/sim/types.ts (no FloorNpc / NpcKindId types), zero modifications to src/registries/ beyond the atlas-recipes.ts append. The only working-tree files modified are: artifacts/phase-update.json (deleted by host wrapper between sessions), assets/atlas.{png,json} (regenerated), docs/ARCHITECTURE.md (Phase 7 contracts section), src/atlas/preset-seeds.ts (4 hash bumps), src/core/self-test.ts (ATLAS_DIGEST bump), src/registries/atlas-recipes.ts (3 imports + 3 slot ids + 3 entries appended), tests/atlas/registry.test.ts (count bump), tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts (golden bumps + comment correction). All scope-correct drift-sweep deliverables; no Phase 7 feature code lands in 7.A.1.

architecture_md_phase_7_section.evidence: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md gains a 'Phase 7 frozen contracts (NPCs + shops + boss)' section between 'Phase 6 frozen contracts' and 'Build-time constants' (~110 new lines). Coverage: NPC data shape (FloorState gains npcs sorted by (kind ASC, then y/x); FloorNpc has kind/pos/inventory; no hp/atk/def — distinct from Monsters; deterministic ordering for SIM_UNORDERED rule); 2-4 additive action types (talk/buy/sell; reuse TAG_TARGET=0x10 for npc-id and TAG_ITEM=0x20 for item-kind; no ACTION_VERSION bump per Phase 1 frozen contract); deterministic shop-transaction resolution path with 2 new domain anchors (shop:stock at floor-spawn time, shop:price at action time); boss FSM as Monster.aiState union extension with HP-threshold transitions (deterministic; no random transitions; phase count pinned in 7.A.2); boss-room spawn override at floor 10 (no mapgen changes — sim-side wiring); win-state transition (src/ui/win-screen.ts reads outcome === 'won'); atlas extension coordinate-stable (existing 26 pinned, ~4 new in 7.A.2); current ATLAS_DIGEST a3f7e3ca…; deferred Phase 7 contracts (exact action vocab, FSM phase count, win-screen layout, NPC dialog flavor).

phase_6_a_2_carry_forwards_disposition.evidence: Phase 6.A.2 cosmetic carry-forward N4 (3 missing atlas recipes) closed by 7.A.1 — recipes added, atlas regenerated, goldens bumped. N1 (inventory count DESC tie-break test), N2 (inventoryRemove validation throw test), N3 (inventory-replay deeper mutation), N5 (per-domain index comment) not addressed in 7.A.1 because the corresponding files (src/sim/inventory.ts, tests/sim/inventory*.test.ts, src/sim/turn.ts) are not modified. Per the docs/PHASES.md:516 acceptance criterion ('addressed where they touch files Phase 7.A.2 will modify'), these are correctly deferred to 7.A.2 if/when those files are touched.

code_review.evidence: artifacts/code-review-phase-7-A-1.md: verdict APPROVE. 0 blockers. Coordinate-stability of the existing 23 sprites confirmed byte-identical via row-major dump comparison. Golden bumps confirmed in 3 places (self-test.ts, preset-seeds.ts, e2e). 2 cosmetic suggestions: (a) e2e spec comment misstated new sprite coordinates as (16,1)/(0,2)/(1,2) — addressed in this approval pass: corrected to (7,1)/(8,1)/(9,1) with explanation that the 16-wide grid was full at (0..6,1) after Phase 6.A.2; (b) registry append-order (stim-patch → trauma-pack → cyberdeck-mod-1) not alphabetical-by-recipe-id but defensible as registry-declaration order — addressed in this approval pass: documented inline that the order is the order Phase 3's items.ts listed these 3 entries when their recipes were absent, and the placer is declaration-order per memo decision 3a frozen-at-landing rule. Final gates re-verified post-fixup: 921 passing, lint clean, typecheck clean, build green.

follow_ups_carried_forward_to_phase_7_a_: Implementation per docs/PHASES.md:520-525: NPC + boss types in src/sim/types.ts (FloorNpc shape, NpcKindId union, boss FSM phase tracking via Monster.aiState extension); src/registries/npcs.ts with ~3 NPC types (npc.fixer + npc.info-broker — npc.ripperdoc already in atlas registry); 2-4 new Action descriptors in src/core/encode.ts additive to the Phase 1 schema (talk/buy/sell or analogous; reuse existing TAG_TARGET + TAG_ITEM; no ACTION_VERSION bump); tick() extended in src/sim/turn.ts to handle NPC interactions with deterministic shop transactions (rollBytes with shop:stock + shop:price domain anchors); ~4 new atlas recipes (3 NPC sprites + boss); boss FSM with multi-phase deterministic transitions on floor 10; boss-room spawn override; win-screen UI in new src/ui/win-screen.ts; assets/atlas.png regenerated → ATLAS_DIGEST + 4 preset-seed expectedHash values bumped AGAIN (Phase 7 ships two atlas regenerations: 7.A.1 and 7.A.2); new BOSS_DIGEST or WIN_DIGEST golden + win-state reachability test.

Phase 6.A.2 cosmetic carry-forwards N1/N2/N3/N5 should be addressed in 7.A.2 IF the corresponding files are touched: N1 (inventory count DESC tie-break test, file: tests/sim/inventory.test.ts); N2 (inventoryRemove validation throw test, file: tests/sim/inventory.test.ts); N3 (inventory-replay deeper mutation, file: tests/sim/inventory-replay.test.ts); N5 (per-domain index comment, file: src/sim/turn.ts). 7.A.2 likely touches src/sim/turn.ts to add NPC tick cases, so N5 lands then.

Phase 7.A.2 strategy-planner pass (optional): material design choices to resolve — single `talk` action opening multi-step UI flow vs. discrete buy/sell transactions; boss FSM phase count and per-phase scaling; win-screen layout. Output lives in the ARCHITECTURE.md Phase 7 section as amendments rather than a separate decision memo.
follow_ups_observations: Phase 7.A.1's atlas regeneration is unusual for an X.A.1 phase (typically X.A.1 is no-binary-changes), but justified by the latent-defect carry-forward (Phase 6.A.2 N4). Phase 7.A.2 will regenerate the atlas a second time when the NPC + boss recipes land — this is the FIRST phase in the project's history that includes two atlas regenerations within a single high-level phase. The deterministic-encoder discipline + cross-OS matrix from Phase 4.B handles both regenerations identically.

Per-recipe unit tests are not landing in 7.A.1 — consistent with Phase 6.A.2's 16-recipe pattern. The whole-atlas ATLAS_DIGEST + 4 preset-seed expectedHash + cross-runtime self-test + Phase 6.B Playwright suite are the load-bearing assertions.
Bundle delta +1.61 KB raw / +0.27 KB gzipped from 3 new recipes is proportional to Phase 6.A.2's 16-recipe gzipped delta (~16x). Stays well under the 75 KB budget.
next_phase: Phase 7.A.2 — sandbox-verifiable NPC + shop + boss-FSM implementation per docs/PHASES.md:520-525. Acceptance criteria summary: a scripted run on a fixed fingerprint can buy an upgrade from a ripperdoc, descend to floor 10, and defeat the boss; win-state transition reachable and replayable (asserted by a new test); all shop transactions deterministic from the state hash (no Math.random for stock generation; rollBytes with shop:stock + shop:price domains); the diagnostic + playable + inventory surfaces continue to render so the cross-runtime Playwright suite from Phases 1.B/2.B/3.B/4.B/5.B/6.B keeps passing alongside the new NPC/shop/boss UI and the bumped ATLAS_DIGEST + preset-seed expectedHash values; npm ci && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e all green. Atlas regenerates with 3 NPC sprites + boss = ~4 new recipes appended; ATLAS_DIGEST + preset-seed hashes bump again (the second atlas regen of Phase 7). Material design choices may benefit from a brief strategy-planner pass.
